author: user_177aa9
rawText:
Good app on a decline - I love Spotify for obvious reasons. I just have a problem with some features. DJ X was good, but now you can “eat your playlist”, and that was okay until messaging??? What’s the point of that! All devices have messaging; a basic feature. Are the devs bored? Let your developers focus on UI and UX improvements, like sometimes when the song name and artist overlap.
Also the website pisses me off. Doesn’t even recognize you when you log in. Won’t let you vote.

author: user_ecd8cc
rawText:
Free tier pointless now - Been using free tier since 2019 on iPad and didn’t mind having to listen to ads. Now, free tier is completely worthless with forced mix shuffle & no ability to choose what you listen to. 
I listen to albums start to finish so Spotify is essentially pointless now. Not getting premium just to play the music I want to hear. After 7 years I guess it’s time to dump Spotify & delete account.
